headline: Regions Financial Announces Dana Nolan to Retire, Tom Speir Named Head of Investor Relations
summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., March 02, 2026--Dana Nolan, head of Investor Relations for Regions, will be succeeded by a company veteran after she retires in April following a 37-year career.
